response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified intro and two songs: 'Fighting My Way' and 'CH4NGE'. 2. Mapped scenes based on song start/end times and performance visual changes. 3. Identified original artists: 'Fighting My Way' (AiNA THE END / Shin Sakura), 'CH4NGE' (Giga). 4. Searched for and retrieved complete lyrics for both songs using queries focused on original artist/composer. 5. Constructed final JSON following the required schema and ensuring correct formatting.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual concert performance by Sakura Miko and Houshou Marine. They perform 'Fighting My Way' and 'CH4NGE' with elaborate stage visuals, dancing, and interactions. Tokoyami Towa appears during 'CH4NGE'.

scenes.description: Introductory greeting by Sakura Miko. No vocal music is playing.
Sakura Miko and Houshou Marine perform the song 'Fighting My Way'. Visuals include a high-tech stage set with neon lights and holographic effects.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Now I'm ready, I'm ready to go
When the flowers bloom, the time has come, are you ready?
You understand, right? I'll show you, make it through
Look, if you're so restless, time will just slip away, so right now
Let's work it out, I won't look away anymore
I'll make it better myself, making the right answer
I just wanna, just wanna find somebody
Somebody more aggressive than me, uh
Make you hot, falling in love
Are you done with your warm-up exercises?
I'll seize victory, so now let's start the war!
I'm fighting my way, I'm fighting my way
Dream future ay-ay, just believe and move forward
I don't have any intention of losing to anyone ever
I want to show you the scenery beyond
Dance in love, all the passion
I want to know even further ahead
I won't stop anymore ay-ay
I will lead the way, just come along my way
Hey! Don't kill my vibe, let's go to the top
Wait a second, if it's a misunderstanding, I'm in trouble
Hey, it's not like I'm fighting to kick you down
Just wanna keep challenging myself
If you get hooked on this fantasy, you'll want more and more
I'm not afraid of anything anymore
I feel like I can go if I'm with you, come join us
Look, it's coming to hear now, yeah, towards the place that calls my name
I'm fighting my way, I'm fighting my way
Dream future ay-ay, just believe and move forward
I don't have any intention of losing to anyone ever
I want to show you the scenery beyond
Take the rain, go through the night, sought the light of the blue sky
Whoa, there's no waste, because I'll turn it into power and shine
Kira kira, the droplets splashed, ah, it's God's will
I'll take you, make you high, I won't let you regret it
I'll cross the boundary, so now let's start the war!
I'm fighting with myself, I'm fighting with myself
There's no such thing as losing ay-ay, just accept the challenge
I can't be beaten by anyone but myself anymore
If you're here, I'll stand up again and again
Sing of love, all the feelings
I don't want to run away, I can't wait
I can't end yet ay-ay
I need you to stay, you make me feel okay
Hey! It's time to shine, let's go to the sky
Weh oh weh oh, ram pam pam para pum pum pa, weh oh weh oh, ahhh ooh uh

scenes.description: Sakura Miko, Houshou Marine, and Tokoyami Towa perform 'CH4NGE'. Visuals change to a more chaotic, abstract neon style.
